hyperedges.label: Cursor Agent Control Plane: Rules, Hooks, and MCP together define the agent's behavior envelope
Structured Outputs Reliability Triad: CFG decoding, schema complexity limits, and grammar caching together guarantee schema-valid AI output
SDD Tooling Triad: GitHub Spec Kit, AWS Kiro, and Tessl each implement SDD at different rigor levels and complexity
Context Degradation Triad: Lost-in-Middle, Dumb Zone, Context Rot all describe the same underlying LLM performance collapse from context overload

RPI Workflow Independent Convergence: RPI (HumanLayer), RPIR (Tyler Burleigh), Atelier harness and Agentic Modernization all independently converged on Research→Plan→Implement as the optimal agentic coding workflow

Context Engineering Solution Space: Intentional Compaction, Progressive Disclosure, and Phase-Based Context Loading are all strategies addressing the same problem of context overload in agentic workflows
Skill Quality Improvement Loop: Progressive Disclosure + Eval-Driven Dev + Description Optimization
MCP Enterprise Stack: Stateless Transport + XAA Auth + AAIF Governance
Skills-over-MCP Discovery System: Lazy Loading + Well-Known Index + URI Resolution
Context Management Triad: Rot Prevention via Subagents, Skills, Hooks
Claude Code Extensibility Stack: Skills + Plugins + Hooks + Subagents
Harness Engineering Core Pattern: Memory + Deterministic Rails + Orchestration
Context Optimization Triad: Hooks + Path-Scoped Rules + Skills as Progressive Disclosure
Agent Protocol Convergence: MCP (tool-to-agent) + A2A (agent-to-agent) form complementary 2026 stack
Context Engineering Foundations: Context Rot + Attention Budget + Instruction Budget share the same finite-resource constraint model
PTC + Tool Search + Sandboxed Execution together constitute the modern token-optimization architecture for agentic tool calling
MCP, A2A, ANP, and ACP form an emerging protocol ecosystem for agent interoperability and communication
Positional bias, U-shaped curve, and in-between effect jointly constrain optimal RAG document placement strategies
